parameters.jsCode:
const ttl = 120;
return { json: { ...$json, expiry_time: Date.now() + (Math.max(30, ttl) * 1000) } };

const msgs=$input.all().map(i=>i.json);const now=Date.now();const re=/\b\d{4}\b/g;for(const m of msgs){const d=new Date(m.date).getTime();if((now-d)/60000>10)continue;const t=`${m.subject||''} ${m.text||m.textPlain||''} ${m.snippet||''}`.toLowerCase();if(t.includes('disney')){const f=t.match(re);if(f&&f.length)return {json:{found:true,code:f[0],source:'gmail'}};}}return {json:{found:false,code:null,source:'gmail'}};

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'Wait_Feedback', account_key: $('Code: Evaluate Loop Condition').first().json.account_key, fail_count: Number($('Code: Evaluate Loop Condition').first().json.fail_count || 0) }) }}

assignments.name: event_key
assignments.value: ={{ ['otp_sent', String($('Code: Normalize OTP Result').first().json.conversation_id || ''), String($execution.id || ''), String($('Code: Normalize OTP Result').first().json.phone || '')].join('|') }}

assignments.name: customer_id
assignments.value: ={{ String($('Code: Evaluate Loop Condition').first().json.phone || $('Code: Normalize OTP Result').first().json.phone || '') }}

assignments.name: metadata
assignments.value: ={{ ({ source: 'wf3', source_event_id: String($execution.id || ''), otp_code: String($('Code: Normalize OTP Result').first().json.code || '') }) }}

nodes.name: Analytics: Send Event OTP Not Sent
